---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the app or training pipeline
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Device / Environment

**If this is an app bug:**
- Device: [e.g. Samsung Galaxy A32]
- Android version: [e.g. Android 12]
- App version: [e.g. v1.0.0]

**If this is a training pipeline bug:**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- TensorFlow version: [e.g. 2.14.0]
- GPU: [e.g. None / NVIDIA RTX 3060]

## Error Logs

```
Paste any error messages or stack traces here
```

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
